default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to understand Teero's business and establish a content strategy partnership with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero is starting from scratch with content marketing, aiming to drive inbound traffic from dental practices](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Primary target audience is dental office managers, with secondary focus on dentists and hygienists](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on providing advice and addressing common pain points in dental practice management](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [GrowthX will handle content creation and publishing, with initial oversight from Teero team](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Topics

### Teero's Business Overview

  - [Dental staffing platform, currently focused on hygienist staffing](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Growing 7x year-over-year, operating in 10 states](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Plans to expand into other dental practice management products (payroll, scheduling, patient booking, insurance verification)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Target customers: dental practices in the US, ranging from small private practices to larger DSOs (Dental Service Organizations)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Drive inbound traffic from qualified dental practices](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Build credibility in the dental industry beyond staffing](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Generate interest for future product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Measure success through inbound dental practice signups and cost-effective customer acquisition compared to outbound sales](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Target Audience and Personas

  - [Primary: Dental office/practice managers (80% focus)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Secondary: Dentists, regional managers, directors of recruiting at larger DSOs](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Tertiary: Hygienists (20% focus for basic, high-impact topics)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)

### Content Themes and Opportunities

  - [Location-based content (e.g., specific to states or cities)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Private practice vs. DSO-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Hygienist staffing challenges and solutions](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Dental practice management advice (e.g., payroll, benefits, hiring)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Compliance and legal issues (e.g., 1099 vs. W-2 employment)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Future product-related topics (e.g., payroll, insurance verification, patient booking)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX to handle content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Initial phase: Teero team (Nate/Christian) to review content before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Long-term goal: Increase autonomy for GrowthX team to publish directly](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)
  - [Frank (Teero) to provide CMS access and discuss category structure with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Weekly sync meetings, preferably on Wednesdays or Thursdays](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3201.0)
  - [Ad-hoc communication via Slack for quick updates and document sharing](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3231.0)
  - [GrowthX to build content workflows in Teero's Airtable instance for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3347.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send updated company brief for Teero's review](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)
  - [Teero to provide additional context documents and materials via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3472.0)
  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough with Frank to set up publishing access](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin topic research and present initial content ideas next week](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3147.0)
  - [Set up weekly sync meeting (preferably 9-10am Pacific Time)](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)
  - [Nick to provide Airtable access to both Teero and GrowthX teams](https://fathom.video/share/69-cqmxssDfaaYWCzZacqirmz3tLsMPs?tab=summary&timestamp=3306.0)

action_items.description: Get added to Teero-GrowthX Slack channel
Add GrowthX team alias to Teero CMS, search console, other relevant tools
Schedule CMS walkthrough meeting w/ Frank; discuss blog categories, tech adjustments
Set up Airtable access for Teero team (view/comment) & GrowthX team (full edit)
Share additional Teero docs, sales materials in Slack for GrowthX team review
